headline: Paramount Skydance App Revamp And Leadership Exit Test Investor Confidence
summary: Paramount Skydance (NasdaqGS:PSKY) has launched a new mobile Paramount+ app with short form video features designed to increase user engagement. The updated app introduces TikTok style scrolling and snackable clips, aiming to keep viewers on the platform for longer sessions. At the same time, president Jeff Shell is exiting the company following a highly public dispute and legal battle. The combination of a product overhaul and a high profile executive departure raises questions around...
